<!-- source-hash: 8afbeec785e6306f7217258066def9e1 -->
Custom exception thrown when a requested event cannot be located in the system, extending the base `NotFoundException` with a specific `EVENT_NOT_FOUND` error code.

## Key Components

| Component | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `EventNotFoundException` | Extends `NotFoundException` with a fixed `ErrorCode.EVENT_NOT_FOUND` error code |
| `ErrorCode.EVENT_NOT_FOUND` | Standardized error code injected automatically on construction |

## Usage Example

```java
// Throw when an event lookup fails
Event event = eventRepository.findById(eventId)
    .orElseThrow(() -> new EventNotFoundException(
        "Event with ID " + eventId + " was not found"
    ));
```
